special_mechanics.name: Low-Gravity Environments
special_mechanics.description: Some levels feature low-gravity, oxygen-free environments that affect player motion

special_mechanics.name: Magnetic Fields
special_mechanics.description: Certain levels contain magnetic fields that interfere with player motion sensor and movement

special_mechanics.name: Oxygen System
special_mechanics.description: Player must manage oxygen levels; oxygen depletion causes death. Oxygen replenished at recharge stations.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Qualitative/empirical data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay descriptions but no quantified physics parameters. Marathon is an FPS with keyboard-based movement and free look. Specific movement speeds, acceleration values, jump physics, and sub-pixel system details are not documented in available sources.
